svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="tsm-straight-path" name="Straight Path Overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="1928" dy="1156" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2000" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;" value="True Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="210" x="895" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane2" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;startSize=34;" value="worker-aggregator Boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="330" x="310" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane3" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;startSize=34;" value="worker-connector Boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="330" x="660" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane4" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;startSize=34;" value="MongoDB Boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="300" x="1010" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mongo" parent="lane4" style="shape=cylinder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="MongoDB Cluster
main storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="170" x="65" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mongoNote" parent="lane4" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;" value="raw data, profiles, snapshots, aggregates, cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="230" x="35" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane5" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;startSize=34;" value="worker-input Boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="330" x="1330" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inputBox" parent="lane5" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;" value="Autoscaled Input Workers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="240" x="45" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inp3" parent="lane5" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;" value="worker-input-N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="85" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="web" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="95" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aggBox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;" value="Autoscaled Aggregator Workers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="240" x="355" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agg1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="worker-aggregator-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="395" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agg2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="worker-aggregator-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="395" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agg3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="worker-aggregator-N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="395" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aggScale" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;" value="HPA / ECS autoscale by queue size" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="380" y="535" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connBox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="Autoscaled Connector Workers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="240" x="705" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" value="worker-connector-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="745" y="280" as="geometry" /> value="worker-connector-N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="745" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connScale" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;" value="HPA / ECS autoscale by queue size" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="730" y="535" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inp1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;" value="worker-input-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="1415" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inp2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;" value="worker-input-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="1415" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inpScale" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;" value="HPA / ECS autoscale by queue size" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="1400" y="535" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stream" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="input stream" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="1740" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proto" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;" value="RabbitMQ async communication / queue protocol between worker boundaries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="700" x="640" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="web" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=3;" target="aggBox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="aggBox" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=3;" target="connBox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="connBox" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=3;" target="mongo" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="inputBox" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=3;" target="mongo" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="stream" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=3;" target="inputBox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"
